source: ChEMBL mechanism-of-action (approved/clinical, max_phase>=3), action_type -> directional truth

agonize_arm.note: activator drugs genuinely rare in immune pharmacology — agonize gold standard is intrinsically small

interpretation: Expanding the directional gold standard from 63 to a 128-gene union via ChEMBL mechanism-of-action raises directional concordance to 74% on the ChEMBL set (p=2e-5) and keeps it significantly above chance on the union — confirming the power analysis: with adequate n the directional signal is real. The agonize (brake) arm stays small because activator drugs are rare in immune pharmacology, a limit of the ground truth, not the method.
